title: code-intel pack registry entry
description: One entry per line of registry/code-intel.jsonl (JSONL). This schema is the documentation-of-record for the entry shape (FR-002..008); enforcement is hand-rolled in scripts/check-code-intel-registry.js — no validator dependency (C-9). Keep the two in sync.

name.description: Kebab-case pack name. Unique across the registry (uniqueness enforced by the checker, FR-010).

tool.description: Underlying tool/binary the pack wraps. Unique across the registry (uniqueness enforced by the checker, FR-010).

repo.description: Where the pack lives: an http(s) URL, or a path relative to the roster repo root (must exist in the repo — existence enforced by the checker, FR-011). Exactly one of the two shapes (FR-004).

languages.description: Languages the pack supports. Closed enum, extensible only by editing this schema (FR-005).

provides.description: Consumer-seam capabilities the pack's skills provide (must match the SKILL.md `provides:` enum).

install.description: Free-text install command block (FR-007). Presented verbatim to the user by discovery — never executed.

tier.description: verified = roster-maintained, CI-covered install+contract; community = schema-valid via PR, not verified by roster (FR-016). Tier changes only via maintainer-merged PR (FR-017).

notes.description: Free-text notes. Optional for community entries; required non-empty for verified entries (FR-008).
